# Solar

> A runtime-based JavaScript UI framework designed for AI-generated code. No build step. Explicit prop contracts, structured errors, and a machine-readable component registry.

Solar runs entirely in the browser. Install via CDN or npm, define components with typed prop schemas, and mount them to any DOM node. It's designed for AI code generation: every component declares what props it accepts, errors surface as structured objects (not thrown exceptions), and the global registry exposes a `manifest()` method that returns a machine-readable schema of every registered component.

## Getting Started

- [Introduction](https://docs.solarbuild.dev/docs/introduction): What Solar is, the design constraints it solves, and how it differs from React/Vue
- [Installation](https://docs.solarbuild.dev/docs/installation): CDN one-liner and npm setup; no bundler required
- [Use Cases](https://docs.solarbuild.dev/docs/use-cases): When Solar is the right tool. AI-assisted UIs, embeddable widgets, no-build environments.

## API Reference

- [defineComponent](https://docs.solarbuild.dev/docs/api/define-component): Core API. Declare a component with a prop schema, render function, and lifecycle hooks.
- [Hooks](https://docs.solarbuild.dev/docs/api/hooks): useState, useResource (async data), useSubscription, useRoute. All hook-based, no class components.
- [h()](https://docs.solarbuild.dev/docs/api/h): Compact hyperscript notation for building element trees without JSX or a build step
- [Registry](https://docs.solarbuild.dev/docs/api/registry): Register components globally; call `registry.manifest()` for a full machine-readable schema
- [Error Reference](https://docs.solarbuild.dev/docs/errors): Every ContractError, hook error, and warning. Includes cause, fix, and code example.

## Guides

- [Agent Quickstart](https://docs.solarbuild.dev/docs/guides/agent-quickstart): How an AI agent discovers components via `registry.manifest()`, mounts them, and handles ContractErrors
- [Building a Site](https://docs.solarbuild.dev/docs/guides/building-a-site): End-to-end walkthrough covering routing, async data fetching, third-party library integration, and GitHub Pages deployment.

## Integrations

- [MCP Server](https://docs.solarbuild.dev/docs/integrations/mcp): solarbuild-mcp exposes your component registry as callable MCP tools — agents can discover components, validate props, and self-correct at runtime.

## npm Packages

- [solarbuild](https://www.npmjs.com/package/solarbuild): The core framework. `npm install solarbuild`
- [create-solarbuild](https://www.npmjs.com/package/create-solarbuild): Project scaffolder. `npm create solarbuild@latest my-app`
- [solarbuild-mcp](https://www.npmjs.com/package/solarbuild-mcp): MCP server for Solar. `npm install solarbuild-mcp`

## Source

- [GitHub](https://github.com/Stahlwalker/framework-solar): Source code, issues, and contributions
